positive: Minimalist and whimsical line art illustration of a celestial gathering: a stylized crescent moon, a constellation of twinkling stars, and a small, playful comet leaving a graceful arc. The design should be contained within a central circular or semi-circular motif, emphasizing clean, black-and-white line work against a crisp white background. The style must evoke Art Deco geometry combined with modern Scandinavian simplicity. Use strong, deliberate linework, negative space mastery, and a high contrast ratio. Composition should feel balanced and symmetrical, perfect for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, writing, busy background, color gradients, low detail, cartoon, sketch, amateur, dirty, messy lines
